title: Hall of Heroes (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''Hall of Heroes''' can refer to locations on a number of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]:

*'''[[Hall of Heroes (Dac)|Hall of Heroes]]''' in [[Orotoru G'am]] on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].
*'''[[X'Ting Hall of Heroes]]''' on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]].
*'''[[Imperial Hall of Heroes]]''' in [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

{{Disambig}}
